## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for changed behaviour
- [ ] TypeScript types are correct (`tsc` passes locally)
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated (README, `docs/`, inline comments)
- [ ] Breaking changes documented in the PR description with migration steps
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Stellar contract changes are backward-compatible or include an upgrade path
